description.value:
Zhirafa drones have a simple claim to fame: they're cheap, durable, and easy to repair, making them an essential tool of most organizations within the Red Decades.

Ground Drones are quadrapeds, usually shaped to resemble headless dogs covered in armor plating. They struggle to move quickly, but will always get where they're going.

Uses the @UUID[Compendium.night-city-gang-and-corp-mook-pack.NCGangsnCorpsMooks.3MeQ26jFt0k6mvC7]{RatSec Ground Drone} statblock.

Includes a slot for mounting any 1-handed weapon which could be mounted in a cyberarm - by default, equipped with either a Dartgun or Very Heavy Pistol. Always equipped with a front-mounted @UUID[Compendium.cyberpunk-red-core.core_gear.clCxd7qkp2olsKii]{Video Camera} and 2 Drone-Integrated Scratchers, a @UUID[Compendium.cyberpunk-red-core.core_cyberware.dM6LI4fqDdgut7Uy]{Scratcher} cyberware attached in both front paws which cannot be removed.

See Controlling Drones in the Associated Homebrew document for more details on how to control the drone, once purchased.
